instructions:
This extension manages Firebase Remote Config across multiple saved projects. Use the available tools to inspect projects, templates, parameters, and conditions. Prefer summarizing differences across projects in a compact comparison format.

Tool routing:

Read tools:
- When a user asks for an overview of configured projects or groups, use list-projects.
- When a user asks to inspect the full template of a specific project (all parameters, conditions, or versions), use get-project-remote-config.
- When a user asks about a flag state across projects (enabled/disabled), use summarize-flag-state-across-projects.
- When a user asks for the raw state or comparison of one parameter by exact key across projects, use find-parameter-across-projects.
- When a user asks about a condition across projects, use find-condition-across-projects.
- When a user searches for parameters by partial name, keyword, or pattern (e.g. 'quais flags contem ocr', 'parametros com login no nome', 'flags related to checkout'), use search-parameters. This is the right tool when the user does NOT know the exact key name.

Write tools (all require user confirmation):
- When a user asks to create, update, or set a parameter value, use upsert-parameter.
- When a user asks to delete or remove a parameter, use delete-parameter.
- When a user asks to create, update, or change a condition, use upsert-condition.
- When a user asks to delete or remove a condition, use delete-condition.

Project references accept local id, Firebase projectId, or display name. Groups can be referenced by name. Write operations apply to all enabled projects by default unless the user specifies a group or project list.

evals.input: @firebase-remote-config-admin quais projetos estao com a flag is_event_flow_v2_enabled ligada?
@firebase-remote-config-admin compare a key social_login_enabled_options entre os projetos
@firebase-remote-config-admin mostra os parametros do projeto shopping-prod
@firebase-remote-config-admin a condition ios_users existe em todos os projetos?
@firebase-remote-config-admin compare a flag checkout_v2 nos projetos do grupo shopping
@firebase-remote-config-admin quais flags contem ocr no nome?
@firebase-remote-config-admin seta a flag ocr_enabled para true em todos os projetos
@firebase-remote-config-admin deleta o parametro legacy_checkout nos projetos do grupo shopping
@firebase-remote-config-admin cria a condition android_beta com expressao device.os == 'android' && app.build.contains('beta')
